name: Meringue Clouds
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pints fresh mixed strawberries and raspberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250 degrees.
2. Whip the egg whites and salt until stiff peaks form.
3. Gradually add sugar, whipping until stiff peaks form.
4. Fold in vanilla extract.
5. Spoon meringue onto a greased cookie sheet, forming 3- to 4-inch shapes.
6. Bake for 45 minutes.
7. Cool the meringues and top with berries that have been marinated in sugar and flavoring.
8. Serve 4 portions.
